title: Minister marks HIAL'ss 40th anniversary with a message

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Minister marks HIAL'ss 40th anniversary with a message. Minister for Agriculture and Connectivity Jim Fairlie gave his thanks to staff past and present at Highlands and Islands Airports Ltd for their service to air passengers on its 40th anniversary.

sourceReferences.citationText: hial-airports – Minister marks HIAL'ss 40th anniversary with a message
